semantic.role: Vitest end-to-end test suite for the CLI 'init' command, verifying interactive prompt and filesystem behavior.
responsibilities: Sets up temporary directories and initializes Git repositories for isolated test environments.
Runs the built CLI binary (dist/cli/index.js) with child_process.spawnSync or execFileSync.
Wraps the prompts module to simulate user input during CLI interaction.
Asserts that created files, directory structures, and configurations match expected outputs.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test via afterEach hooks.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual modules or functions.
Integration tests that do not involve the full CLI invocation.
Production code or non-test source files.
invariants: The file must adhere to the 'test-file-suffix' rule: file names must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
All tests must be idempotent and not depend on global system state.
Vitest is the sole test runner used.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish end-to-end validation of CLI command behavior, specifically the 'init' command, by simulating real user input and checking filesystem outcomes.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Add E2E test suite for CLI commands (37 tests across 7 files) as indicated by commit 171f7b4.

English.role: Vitest end-to-end test suite for the CLI 'init' command, verifying interactive prompt and filesystem behavior.
responsibilities: Creates temporary directories and initializes Git repositories for isolated test environments.
Executes the built CLI binary using child_process.spawnSync or execFileSync.
Simulates user input by wrapping the prompts module.
Asserts that generated files and configurations match expected outputs.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test via afterEach hooks.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual modules or functions.
Integration tests that do not involve the full CLI invocation.
Production code or non-test source files.

Simplified Chinese.role: Vitest 端到端测试套件，用于验证 CLI 'init' 命令的交互式提示与文件系统行为。
responsibilities: 创建临时目录并初始化 Git 仓库，提供隔离的测试环境。
通过 child_process.spawnSync 或 execFileSync 执行构建后的 CLI 二进制文件。
通过封装 prompts 模块来模拟用户输入。
断言生成的文件、目录结构与配置与预期一致。
使用 afterEach 钩子清理每个测试后的临时目录。
outOfScope: 针对单独模块或函数的单元测试。
不涉及完整 CLI 调用的集成测试。
生产代码或非测试源文件。
